title: YTMND Eva
wikitext:
[]: YTMND Eva Post by n00dle » Sun Apr 29, 2007 11:49 pm I was bored the other day, so on a whim I began searching YTMND for Eva stuff. And now I present to you all, some of my favorites. Yes, I am lame, and yes, I am aware that most of these are stupid and immature. But goddamn if they aren't amusing. http://theendof4chan.ytmnd.com/ to bad it didn't stay dead... http://gtat3new.ytmnd.com/ good photo shopping http://gendo.ytmnsfw.com/ oooooooooooh baby! http://eva8bit.ytmnd.com/ go go, Yui-sama go! http://shinjismind.ytmnd.com/ I feel your pain man, I feel your pain. http://macgyvereva.ytmnd.com/ he truly can save anything... http://asukarazorad.ytmnd.com/ wonder if she uses it for those legs? http://shinjicard.ytmnd.com/ I feel so bad about laughing at it...but I did... http://catcheva.ytmnd.com/ run dude run! http://gendoeatsbabies.ytmnd.com/ mmmm...tasty! http://evaorly.ytmnd.com/ well...he does look like an owl... http://gendofacial.ytmnd.com/ boy...that web address sounds kinda wrong. http://vaderonevangelionliveaction.ytmnd.com/ of course, I'm personally looking forward to it, it is WETA after all. they've never let me down before. http://ikarifails.ytmnd.com/ gotta love that ADV dub. http://authority.ytmnd.com/ maybe this will be the brand new ending in the Rebuild? I can only hope... http://reipod.ytmnd.com/ you knew it was only a matter of time. everyone seems to shell out to Apple these days... http://heavymetalmachine.ytmnd.com/ as if she wasn't already the coolest mom ever. http://evangelionquartet.ytmnd.com/ so cute! http://rei-the-cylon.ytmnd.com/ gah! so thats their plan! Monotone us to death. bastards! http://asukahentai.ytmnsfw.com/ Jesus, EoE was a disturbing movie http://evasandwich.ytmnd.com/ hehehehe... http://subliminalomg.ytmnd.com/ best part is how advertising is spelled wrong... *phew* ok thats all. I did all the searching so you don't have to!

[]: Post by slothen » Mon Apr 30, 2007 12:01 am lol some of these are pretty funny. And I've never seen maggoty Asuka before.. scary.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Apr 30, 2007 12:24 am http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1197
